description: Swell is an ecommerce platform for building and operating customizable online stores. It provides backend commerce/data APIs, frontend storefront APIs, and tooling for developing apps and storefront extensions.
summary: Swell exposes a REST Backend API at `https://api.swell.store`, a tenant-scoped Frontend GraphQL API at `https://<your-store-id>.swell.store/graphql/v2`, and a Node-based `swell` CLI; all require Swell-issued credentials.
